title: fraxinus excelsior var. angustifolia
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved ash, is a variety of the ash tree that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. angustifolia include its ability to treat conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of Fraxinus excelsior var. angustifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
